triggers.name: Enemy timer: Drowsy
triggers.comments: ~2m30s at level 50 (formula 6, cap 35 ticks); DoT/debuff; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Beastlord level 20. Landing or damage lines bind the bar to its mob; area effects fan out to one target-bound bar per landing.

triggers.name: Enemy timer: Venom of the Snake
triggers.pattern: ^You begin casting Venom of the Snake(?: (?P<rank>[IVXLCDM]+))?\.$
triggers.comments: ~0m36s at level 50 (formula 1, cap 6 ticks); DoT/debuff; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Beastlord level 52. Landing or damage lines bind the bar to its mob; area effects fan out to one target-bound bar per landing.

triggers.name: Enemy timer cleared: Malaria
triggers.pattern: ^Your Malaria(?: (?P<rank>[IVXLCDM]+))? spell has worn off(?: of (.+))?\.$
triggers.comments: Cancels the cast-start countdown early (mez break, mob death) and re-announces on the overlay. Overlay text only — curated packs own the spoken wear-offs.
